rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to July 15, 2015. An amended petition was filed 6/19/15 (notes asked only for a supplemental declaration). An amended pleading requires the same notice of hearing (including publication) as the pleading it amends (CRC 7.53(a)). New notice - full 15 days- and new publication required.
